items.title: Demonologist – Hotfix v2.1.1
items.summary: Demonologist – Hotfix v2.1.1 Hello Demonologists, We've just released another hotfix focused on resolving issues reported by the community after the latest update. Fixes Fixed an issue where clients (non-host players) could not complete opt
items.content:
Demonologist – Hotfix v2.1.1

Hello Demonologists,

We've just released another hotfix focused on resolving issues reported by the community after the latest update.

Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where clients (non-host players) could not complete optional objectives.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue that prevented the exorcism from completing on the Hospital map.

    [/*]

  • Adjusted several sequences on Oakville Library.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where emotes would sometimes play without audio.

    [/*]

  • Fixed invisible walls on multiple maps that could block player movement.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue preventing the Suzie objective from being completed on Bedlam.

    [/*]

  • Fixed various graphical issues across multiple maps.

    [/*]

  • Fixed several design-related issues.

    [/*]

Thank you to everyone who continues to report bugs and share feedback. Your reports help us improve Demonologist with every update, and we'll continue working on additional fixes and improvements.

Happy Hunting! ❤️

Clock Wizard Games

items.title: Demonologist – Patch Notes
items.summary: Demonologist – Patch Notes v2.1.0 Hello Demonologists, A new update has arrived, bringing two brand-new investigation areas, over 200 new events, gameplay improvements, communication system updates, optimization work, and much more. New Con
items.content:
Demonologist – Patch Notes v2.1.0

Hello Demonologists,

A new update has arrived, bringing two brand-new investigation areas, over 200 new events, gameplay improvements, communication system updates, optimization work, and much more.

New Content

New Maps

Oakville Street has been added to the game. Built around the atmosphere of Demonologist's earlier investigations, Oakville Street offers a familiar blend of suspense, exploration, and paranormal activity while introducing plenty of new scares to uncover.

Oakville Library has been added to the game. Oakville Library brings a different kind of fear. The vast halls, towering shelves, and eerie silence create a constant sense of unease, making every investigation feel tense from beginning to end.

New Events

More than 200 new sequences have been added across Oakville Street and Oakville Library.

Facility Update

The Snatcher has escaped from the Facility.

New Cosmetics

New outfits have been added and are now available for purchase.

Emote System

A brand-new Emote System has been added.

Gameplay & Systems

Voice Communication Rework

The in-game voice communication system has been updated.

  • Dead players and living players can no longer hear each other.

    [/*]

  • Voice volume now decreases based on player distance.

    [/*]

  • Players who are far enough apart will no longer be able to hear each other at all.

    [/*]

Chat System Rework

The chat system has been updated.

  • Dead and living players now have separate chat channels.

    [/*]

  • Dead players can see messages from both living and dead players.

    [/*]

  • Living players can only see messages from other living players.

    [/*]

Focus System

Fixed an issue that allowed players to move forward and backward while focusing on the screen.

Chromatic Aberration will now automatically be disabled while focusing.

Animations

Animations for several tools have been revised:

  • Hammer

    [/*]

  • Pocket Watch

    [/*]

  • Camera

    [/*]

User Experience

Loading Screen Improvements

The loading screen has been completely revamped both visually and technically.

Players will now encounter different map images during loading regardless of which map they are entering.

Audio Improvements

The walking sound played while crouching has been replaced and its volume has been reduced.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Various visual and design issues have been fixed.

    [/*]

  • Overall game optimization improvements have been implemented.

    [/*]

  • Collision issues on several maps have been resolved.

    [/*]

  • Lighting adjustments have been made on selected maps.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where held items could clip into walls while crouching near surfaces.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue that caused custom control settings to reset after restarting the game.

    [/*]

  • Various localization fixes and improvements have been implemented.

    [/*]

Achievements

New achievements have been added.

The investigation continues...

Explore Oakville, watch your surroundings, and if you hear footsteps in the Library... make sure they're yours.

Happy Hunting! ❤️

Clock Wizard Games

items.title: Master Demonology with the Warlock — Diablo Immortal
items.summary: Celebrate the arrival of Immortal’s 10th Class, the Warlock. Harness a powerful new Legendary Gem, and more.
items.content:
A brooding force has arrived in Sanctuary. The Bloodied Jewel major update brings Diablo Immortal’s 10th class: the Warlock. Bend demons to your will, sacrifice your life and soul for untold power. Survive the twisted streets of Lut Gholein, brave terrifying new Helliquary bosses, and earn three new powerful Legendary Gems.

As with previous content updates, there will be server maintenance starting on June 16, 2026 from 5 p.m. – 7 p.m. PDT for Oceania, East Asia, Southeast Asia, and Europe servers, and on June 17, 2026 from 1 a.m. — 3 a.m. PDT for servers in the Americas. After the maintenance has concluded, all items mentioned below will be live specific dates for any features going live afterward are provided below.

Vizjerei summoners brought darkness to Sanctuary when they conjured demons from the Burning Hells to serve and empower them. For that offense, the Vizjerei were stripped of their titles, forbidden to practice demonology, and branded as the vilest humans alive following the Mage Clan Wars.

But the Mage Clan Wars were a long time ago, and Sanctuary’s memory is as short as the lives of its people.

Though the Vizjerei no longer practice demonology, select writings survived confiscation by the Viz-Jaq’Taar assassins. In this current, frightful age, lists of demons’ true names and old clan practices are being discovered by hedge mages and upstarts. Those who wield the forbidden powers of demonology share the Vizjerei tolerance for risk and have earned the contemptible name “Warlock.”

The Warlock is Diablo Immortal’s 10th class – a summoner of demons, master of portals, and wielder of Hell’s dark power. With Diablo’s 30th Anniversary and the arrival of Patch 5.0, that power is in your hands! For more information, read our Deep Dive into the Warlock class .

Event Times: All three Warlock-only events run from June 17 - July 6, 3:00 a.m.

Experience the origin of the partnership between the Warlock and the Soulgorger.

The Warlock release will feature a Warlock-exclusive speedrun version of the Mad King’s Breach dungeon where the top players in Leaderboard can earn exclusive rewards.

Enter a unique Fractured Plane to experience the new Warlock class and complete levels to progress. You will be randomly assigned one of four Level 60 builds before entering.

Known as the “Jewel of the Desert,” the port city of Lut Gholein has been overrun by demons in thrall to Andariel, Maiden of Anguish.

The new Common Ward subzone will take you inside part of the captured city that includes new demonic adversaries, bounties, and wanted monsters. Take a fresh look at this classic Diablo locale as it is devastated by an implacable and sadistic adversary. With the release of the new main questline, you’ll be able to explore and fight enemies in the docks, gutters, abandoned taverns, and ruined homes of Lut Gholein, while other parts of the city remain sequestered … for now.

To let everyone experience the latest story as soon as possible, the unlock requirements for the Lut Gholein main quest will be adjusted after this update. All adventurers who reach Paragon Level 90 can begin the Lut Gholein main quest directly without completing the prerequisite story. At the same time, the game will support freely switching between the old and new main storylines, allowing adventurers to choose their own pace of progression.

With the addition of new Inferno difficulties and Helliquary bosses, the Helliquary Gauntlet is being updated to expand the challenge and rewards.

items.title: 5 Video Games Like Phasmophobia
items.summary: "Phasmophobia" has you and your friends locked in terror until all the horrors are conquered. Need more like it? These five games creep close to the goal.
items.content:
Kinetic Games Among the scariest games released within the past several years is "Phasmophobia," developed by the British studio Kinetic Games. The game is available to play solo or online cooperatively, with players controlling a team of ghost hunters. Each level has players investigate a haunted site to determine what kind of spirit is prowling the area. The game ended up getting fixed because it had too many scares as a testament to its overall fear factor.

The surprise success of "Phasmophobia" led to many team-based ghost-hunting games filling the market, several of which are quite good. These games each feature their own memorably haunted sites and unique ghosts to keep players on their toes. With that particular niche in mind, we're listing games that place players in the midst of the haunting as they try to determine what spectral activity they've found themselves up against. Here are five video games like "Phasmophobia," all picked to help keep the paranormal frights coming after you in the dark.

Kyle's Garage Launched in early access in 2021, the indie game "Obsideo" offers its own twist on team-based ghostly investigations. With a squad of anywhere from one to four players working together, the game has priests visit various haunted sites. Using their own tools and environmental clues to determine what kind of malevolent ghost is active in a given assignment. From there, players must properly carry out the appropriate exorcism ritual to purge the malicious spirit for good.

To be clear, "Obsideo" is still in its early access phase and has also gone without updates for long enough to be flagged as possibly abandoned. That makes it a cautious buy (and a sometimes temperamental one), with frustrated players rating it as "mixed" at present. But if you push through, "Phasmophobia" fans will recognize a similar setup to the game, with enough distinct features to keep the experience fresh. The inclusion of the exorcism mechanic is a welcome addition, not only distinguishing it from "Phasmophobia" but giving players the opportunity to fight back. Hopefully, "Obsideo" will get a final official release, but the early access shows a lot of promise and hews closely to the Kinetic Games title.

LostOneTeam Another game technically still within its early access phase is the 2022 title "Ghost Exile" by LostOneTeam. The game also has teams of up to four players working together to examine sites with suspected hauntings in desperate need of an exorcism. Like "Phasmophobia" and many other games on this list, players use environmental clues to determine what kind of phantasm they're facing. Using their equipment, the players then perform an exorcism, though there are lethally dire consequences if they misidentify the apparitions.

"Ghost Exile" brings the spectral terror and crime scene investigation elements to the forefront of its gameplay, but with its own twists. The game offers more customization options for players to make the experience feel truly their own, right down to character design. Like "Phasmophobia," the game also possesses a voice recognition mechanic, allowing players to communicate with ghosts during their examination. With ghosts that can level up and an unlockable skill tree, "Ghost Exile" brings a surprising amount of depth to its familiar premise.

Clock Wizard Games The 2023 game "Demonologist" dials up the sheer terror and supernatural menace compared to many of the other titles on this list. The game again has players either work alone or with teams of up to four to investigate paranormal locations. After identifying the types of apparitions that present around a given site, players can then work together to exorcise the lethal entities; familiar, but it works. The ghosts feel much more dangerous than they do in "Phasmophobia" as they will lash out and stalk players investigating them.

"Demonologist" is definitely one of those horror games that you should play during the spooky season . This is a game that heavily evokes a pervasively unsettling atmosphere and ramps up the suspense as the various spirits go on the offensive. To elevate the scares, the game features incredibly detailed environments and an immersive sound design, really putting players on edge. An even more intense take on a familiar premise, "Demonologist" is best played with friends, rather than taking on these hellish frights alone.

Dreambyte Games The 2024 game "Forewarned" has more of a grave robbing premise rather than one revolving around paranormal investigations. The game has teams of up to four players raid ancient Egyptian tombs for treasure, only to incur supernatural wrath at each burial site. The investigative elements that are present in the gameplay are used to identify the types of undead monsters prowling the sites. With this knowledge, players can exploit the mummies' strengths and weaknesses as they recover holy relics and escape in one piece.

With a cultural focus on Egyptian legends and some slightly silly stereotypes, "Forewarned" certainly stands out from other supernatural investigation games out on the market. The game's tomb raiding premise also helps differentiate it, while providing players with an alternative objective to other games on this list. Like "Phasmophobia," the game also enjoys virtual reality headset functionality, making it a particularly terrifying game to play in VR . A team-based game that does something much more distinct with the usual premise, "Forewarned" is a lot of fun when coordinating with friends over the immersive device.

Renderise After initially launching in an early access phase on Steam in 2022, "Ghost Watchers" got its official release in 2025. Like every other game on this list, the title allows up to four players working together to battle ghosts. Players explore haunted locations like abandoned houses, police stations, and ghost towns to determine what kind of paranormal activity is afoot. From there, gamers have a whole arsenal of tools to help them fight back against the deadly enemies and end their threat for good.

With dozens of unique enemy types and an immersive variety of environments to explore and purge of phantasms, "Ghost Watchers" reflects its years of hard work from the developers. Renderise has crafted a genuinely spooky experience that, like all the other games on this list, is best experienced in the company of friends. Because many of the enemies in this game are truly terrifying, purging them is all the more satisfying. A moody little ghost hunt, "Ghost Watchers" is the most recent title on this list and one well worth checking out.

items.title: Warlock as a Demonologist: A Look at the Diablo 4 x WoW Collaboration
items.summary: On Saturday, May 2, the third collaboration cosmetic set between Diablo 4 and World of Warcraft (WoW) was released.
items.content:
On Saturday, May 2, the third collaboration cosmetic set between Diablo 4 and World of Warcraft (WoW) was released. This collaboration has garnered significant attention, as it is packed with homages to early WoW expansions, from the original game through Wrath of the Lich King.

These Warcraft collaboration cosmetics are based on the iconic Tier armor sets that players wore back in the original game. Along with these, legendary weapons that players once wielded in-game—such as Ashbringer, Sulfuras, Shadowmourne, and Thori'dal—have also been recreated. Let’s take a look at how these Warcraft collaboration items appear in-game.

Taste the flames! Molten Core Tier sets in Diablo 4

The newly released Warcraft Collection pack consists of class-specific armor cosmetics designed based on WoW's Tier 2 sets.

Tier sets were class-specific gear sets dropped as rewards from top-tier raids each season. They were developed not just for their stats, but for their distinct and attractive designs tailored to each class. With every new raid release, the design of the new Tier set always draws significant interest.

The Tier 2 sets were the gear dropped in the early raid, Molten Core. They enjoyed long-lasting popularity due to their iconic designs that perfectly captured the class fantasy. They are so symbolic that they were even remastered with modern modeling to celebrate WoW's 20th anniversary in 2024.

The class associations between Diablo 4 and WoW in this collaboration are also quite interesting. The Barbarian received the Warrior's Tier set, while the Sorcerer was paired with the Mage, which shares a similar concept. The Necromancer received the Death Knight's armor (added for the 20th anniversary), and the Spiritborn was given the Shaman's gear, as both classes manipulate nature's spirits. The Druid, Rogue, and Paladin were reborn as their WoW counterparts, and the Spiritborn (Warlock) donned the set of the Warlock, sharing the same English name.

A mount you couldn't get in Azeroth, now rideable in Sanctuary

Along with class-specific cosmetics, individual WoW-themed items have also been released. You can find mounts based on iconic bosses from early expansions like Anzu and Sindragosa, as well as pets like the mini-Ragnaros and 'Murk-li-el,' a Murloc dressed as Tyrael.

Additionally, a set of gear related to Illidan Stormrage, the final boss of The Burning Crusade, has been introduced. It includes back ornaments recreating Illidan's wings, the Bulwark of Azzinoth (famous as a 'front-facing shield'), Warglaive of Azzinoth, Zhar'doom, Greatstaff of the Devourer, and finally, the Skull of Gul'dan that Illidan carried.

You can also find the Ashbringer in the Reliquary

A Warcraft-themed Reliquary has also been introduced. You can purchase the items within the Reliquary using currency earned naturally through gameplay. Some items can be purchased solely with in-game currency without any additional cost, allowing you to acquire Warcraft collaboration items without spending real money.

Paid items consist of iconic WoW weapons like Ashbringer, Sulfuras, Thunderfury, and Atiesh, as well as flashy Town Portal effects. Also, note that if you purchase all items in the Reliquary, you can obtain the Soulflayer Hakkar pet, based on the boss famous for the Corrupted Blood incident.

K/DA and Taric - Coa, Haeun, Yeovlynn, Rakang, Bong

items.title: Demonologist – Patch Notes v2.0.0
items.summary: Demonologist – Patch Notes v2.0.0 Hello Demonologists, We’re thrilled to announce that Update 2.0.0 is now live! This update is a major milestone for Demonologist, bringing engine upgrades, visual overhauls, new content, and many improvemen
items.content:
Demonologist – Patch Notes v2.0.0

Hello Demonologists,

We’re thrilled to announce that Update 2.0.0 is now live!

This update is a major milestone for Demonologist, bringing engine upgrades, visual overhauls, new content, and many improvements across the game.

Engine & Rendering

  • Upgraded the game engine from Unreal Engine 5.3 to Unreal Engine 5.6

    [/*]

  • Lumen has been added

    • With Lumen, lighting now feels more realistic and significantly strengthens the overall atmosphere

      [/*]
    [/*]

Visual & Atmospheric Improvements

  • Visual improvements have been made across all maps and safe houses

    [/*]

  • Radical texture changes on selected maps

    [/*]

  • Atmospheres across all maps have been reworked

    [/*]

  • Design additions made to certain maps

    [/*]

  • Hiding lockers have been redesigned

    [/*]

  • Multiple design-related issues have been fixed

    [/*]

  • Lighting improvements applied to all maps

    • Fixed light leaking issues on certain maps

      [/*]

    • Light sources have been added, adjusted, and improved

      [/*]
    [/*]

New Content

New Map

  • Cursed Chapel

    • Includes 190+ new sequences

      [/*]
    [/*]

New Safe House

  • Facility

    [/*]

  • New safe house customization options added

    [/*]

Character & Animation Updates

  • New character animations added

    [/*]

  • Running animation updated

    [/*]

  • Improvements to make player movement feel more alive and realistic

    [/*]

  • Hair animations added to characters

    [/*]

  • Ghost animations updated

    • Movement animations of visible ghosts have been changed and improved

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Exorcism animation added to the Funeral Home map

    [/*]

Sequences

New Sequences Added

  • Abandoned House

    [/*]

  • Deadwood House

    [/*]

  • Kurosawa House

    [/*]

  • Hospital

    [/*]

  • Haunted School

    [/*]

Existing Sequences Improved

  • Funeral Home

    [/*]

  • Farm House

    [/*]

  • Cyclone Street

    [/*]

  • Bedlam

    [/*]

Gameplay Changes

  • Player stamina has been increased

    [/*]

Achievements

  • 2 new achievements added:

    • No Devourer Today

      [/*]

    • Did it get blood on it?

      [/*]
    [/*]

Localization

  • Localization fixes and additions implemented

    [/*]

Step carefully, trust your instincts… and don’t look back. Share your thoughts and experiences with us. We’re watching. 👁️

Happy Hunting! ❤️ Clock Wizard Games A Note from the Developers

Honestly, this update exists because of you.

Your feedback, clips, streams, bug reports, and even the random late-night messages keep shaping Demonologist more than you might think. We read, we watch, and we take notes — all of it matters.

Cursed Chapel was built with the community in mind: how you move through spaces, how tension builds, and those moments where everything goes wrong in the best way possible.

This isn’t a final version, and it’s definitely not the end. We’ll be closely watching how you play the new map and we’ll keep improving things step by step.

Thanks for sticking with us, scaring yourselves, and being part of this journey.

Clock Wizard Team ❤️

items.title: Demonologist Update 2.0.0 Delivers Engine Upgrade and New Content
items.summary: Demonologist Update 2.0.0 upgrades Unreal Engine, adds Lumen lighting, introduces the Cursed Chapel map, and delivers major visual and gameplay improvements.
items.content:
Demonologist Update 2.0.0 marks a major milestone for the game, introducing a substantial engine upgrade alongside sweeping visual and atmospheric improvements. The update enhances lighting realism through the addition of Lumen and applies broad refinements across maps, safe houses, and environmental design.

Alongside technical upgrades, the patch adds new playable content, expanded customization options, updated animations, and gameplay adjustments. New sequences, achievements, and localization updates further round out one of the most comprehensive updates released to date.

Demonologist Update 2.0.0 is available now on PC. Demonologist originally launched in Early Access on March 27, 2023, with its full 1.0 release arriving on September 25, 2023.

Have you noticed these changes? Share your thoughts in the comments!

Ali Haider loves to dabble in multimedia projects. He has a passion for editing and managing YouTube videos and loves writing in his spare time.

items.title: Demonologist review: More Screams per Minute than a Cursed Karaoke Night
items.summary: Buckle up, you brave souls! "Demonologist" ain’t your grandma
items.content:
Buckle up, you brave souls! "Demonologist" ain’t your grandma's Ouija board session. It’s more like a haunted house party where the guests are a tad too touchy-feely. Here's the scoop on this ghost-infested, co-op spookfest that might make you shit bricks or just yawn in the face of ghostly terror.

Kudos to the devs, the game’s ambiance is creepier than your uncle’s basement. The locales are a masterpiece of "nope," with eerie-ass sounds and visuals that’ll have you jumping at your own shadow. It's like walking into a horror movie, but you forgot the popcorn and the escape route.

The gameplay’s slower than a zombie on a hangover. It’s a mix of strategy and investigation, which can be a drag for those who prefer their horror with more stabby-stabby and less thinky-thinky. Sure, you’ve got your gadgets and ghost-busting gizmos, but sometimes it feels like you’re trying to perform an exorcism with a spatula.

Graphics-wise, "Demonologist" isn’t winning any beauty contests. It’s atmospheric, sure, but don’t expect to be blown away. The visuals are like a haunted house – good enough to set the mood, but you're not going to want to take any of it home.

The jumpscares? Let’s just say they’re more predictable than a politician’s lies. Sometimes they get you, but after a while, you see them coming from a mile away, like a drunk ghost stumbling down the hallway.

The game’s a co-op, which means you can share the scares and the frustrations. It’s like being in a haunted canoe; it’s only fun if everyone’s paddling, or in this case, screaming together. Teamwork makes the dream work, especially if that dream is filled with nightmarish ghouls.

The battles are a mindfuck of strategy. It’s not about how fast you can swing your holy water, it’s about outsmarting the undead. It’s like playing chess with a demon – only the chessboard is your sanity.

Performance-wise, it’s a bit of a demonic rollercoaster. Framerate drops and crashes can jerk you out of the experience faster than a nun at a strip club. And let’s not forget those delightful little bugs that pop up like uninvited poltergeists.

So, is "Demonologist" worth your soul...err, I mean time? If you’re into slow-burn horror with a side of strategy and don’t mind a few technical hiccups, then hell yeah. It’s like going on a ghost tour – sometimes thrilling, sometimes you’re just there for the cheap thrills, 7.0 out of 10.

items.title: The Spirits Whisper… News From Team 💀
items.summary: Hey everyone! We hope you’ve been enjoying your hunts lately. Things have been a little quiet on our side, but don’t worry we’re still deep in the shadows working on new improvements and surprises for Demonologist.👻 Right now, we’re testin
items.content:
Hey everyone!

We hope you’ve been enjoying your hunts lately. Things have been a little quiet on our side, but don’t worry we’re still deep in the shadows working on new improvements and surprises for Demonologist.👻

Right now, we’re testing some visual updates and new gameplay tweaks behind the scenes. It’s taking time, but we want to make sure everything feels just right before we share more.

Here’s a small peek:

Thank you all for your patience and support your messages, videos, and hunts keep us motivated every day. Stay tuned… the spirits aren’t done with you yet.💀

The Clock Wizard Team ❤️

items.title: Exciting News for Demonologist Fans: Night Club Simulator 🍸
items.summary: Hello Demonologist Community We are thrilled to introduce a brand-new game developed by our second team , designed specifically for you and your friends to have an absolute blast together! 🔥 Introducing: Night Club Simulator! 🔥 In this ga
items.content:
Hello Demonologist Community

We are thrilled to introduce a brand-new game developed by our second team, designed specifically for you and your friends to have an absolute blast together!

🔥 Introducing: Night Club Simulator! 🔥

In this game, you and your friends will take on the challenge of transforming a rundown nightclub into the hottest venue in town. But it won’t be easy—you’ll have to manage chaos, deal with rowdy customers, craft unique cocktails, and unlock exciting new upgrades to create the ultimate nightlife experience.

🚀 Play the Free Demo on February 24th!

The game will have a completely free demo available on February 24th, allowing you to experience the nightlife madness with your friends! Don’t forget to add it to your wishlist to stay updated on all the latest details.

🔔 Stay Connected on Discord!

We have also updated our Discord channels so you can stay informed about everything related to Night Club Simulator. Make sure to grab the Night Club Simulator Role to receive all the latest news and announcements! While our first team continues to work on Demonologist, our second team has been pouring their passion into this exciting new project. Rest assured, Demonologist will keep receiving updates and improvements, but we wanted to bring you something fresh and equally fun to enjoy. We can't wait to share more details soon! Let us know what you think, and get ready for a wild ride in Night Club Simulator! 🍹🎶🔥

Wishlist NOW

https://store.steampowered.com/app/2943670/Night_Club_Simulator/ — Clock Wizard Games Team

items.title: Demonologist Overhaul – Major Updates Incoming! 🎃🔧
items.summary: Hello Demonologist community, We’ve been hard at work behind the scenes, and today we’re excited to share some major updates regarding Demonologist’s future! 🔹 Full Graphical Overhaul – We’re completely revamping the visuals to bring a fre
items.content:
Hello Demonologist community,

We’ve been hard at work behind the scenes, and today we’re excited to share some major updates regarding Demonologist’s future!

🔹 Full Graphical Overhaul – We’re completely revamping the visuals to bring a fresh, immersive experience. Expect improved lighting, textures, and an overall more atmospheric world.

🔹 VRAM & Performance Optimization – We’re focusing on optimizing memory usage and overall game performance, ensuring smoother gameplay for all players, regardless of hardware.

🔹 VIVOX & Speech Recognition Improvements – Our team is investigating deeper integrations and improvements to voice processing. While there are some technical limitations with current solutions, we are actively working on refining them for a better experience.

While there are still some minor challenges, rest assured that none of them are major roadblocks. Our top priority is to refine and optimize the game, making sure it runs flawlessly.

We’ll be sharing new visuals and updates soon! Thank you for your patience and support. We can’t wait for you to experience the improvements! 🖤👻

— Clock Wizard Games Team

items.title: Demonologist v1.5.1 Patch
items.summary: Hello everyone, Version 1.5.1 is here! This patch includes some fixes and adjustments for the latest map's exorcism to be more solo-play friendly. Improved/Changed/Adjusted: Funeral Home exorcism times are adjusted for singleplayer game mod
items.content:
Hello everyone, Version 1.5.1 is here! This patch includes some fixes and adjustments for the latest map's exorcism to be more solo-play friendly. Improved/Changed/Adjusted:
  • Funeral Home exorcism times are adjusted for singleplayer game mode. -Nightmare timer increased from 1:30 to 2:15 -Hard timer increased from 2:00 to 2:45 -Medium timer increased from 3:00 to 3:15 -Easy timer didn't change
Fixes:
  • Spawn point for the Tarot Cards in kitchen.
  • Placing ESG where you shouldn't in the new map.
  • Graphical issue in the bedroom.
Clock Wizard Games

items.title: Demonologist v1.5.0 Update
items.summary: Hello Demonologists, We're thrilled to announce that the update 1.5.0 is out! Here's what’s new: New map – Funeral Home: Dare to explore our eerie new map! Performance improvements: Smoother gameplay and optimized performance across the boa
items.content:
Hello Demonologists, We're thrilled to announce that the update 1.5.0 is out! Here's what’s new:
  • New map – Funeral Home: Dare to explore our eerie new map!
  • Performance improvements: Smoother gameplay and optimized performance across the board.
  • Ghost enhancements: We've made adjustments to improve the behavior and experience with ghost encounters.
Get ready for a spine-chilling adventure! Let us know your thoughts, and stay tuned for more! Yes it's been some time, but it'll worth the wait; your patience is much appreciated! Happy Hunting! ❤️ Clock Wizard Games

items.title: Our New Map is Coming Soon!
items.summary: Dear Demonologists We’re thrilled to announce that a brand-new map is coming to the world of Demonologist! This update will introduce an entirely new environment full of challenges and mysteries unlike anything you’ve experienced before. Th
items.content:
Dear Demonologists

We’re thrilled to announce that a brand-new map is coming to the world of Demonologist! This update will introduce an entirely new environment full of challenges and mysteries unlike anything you’ve experienced before. The atmosphere, mechanics, and surprises packed into this map are designed to offer our players a fresh and immersive experience. We can't wait for you to dive into it! This exciting update will be available very soon, and we believe it will change the way you approach the game with new strategic dynamics and opportunities. To make sure you don’t miss out on any updates, be sure to follow our Steam publisher page. Also, we highly recommend joining our Discord channel for instant news, updates, and community events! This is not just where you’ll get the latest info, but also where you can share the excitement with fellow players. What should you do?

Follow our Steam publisher page!

Clock Wizard Games Publishing Page

Join our Discord server

Clock Wizard Games Discord Channel

As always, your feedback is incredibly valuable to us, and we can’t wait to hear your thoughts and suggestions on the new map! See you soon, The Demonologist Dev Team

items.title: The Demonologist Halloween Event Is Now Live!
items.summary: With the launch of version 1.1.0., Demonologist is bringing in the skeletons and boogiemen to celebrate Halloween! Though the update...
items.content:
With the launch of version 1.1.0., Demonologist is bringing in the skeletons and boogiemen to celebrate Halloween! Though the update contains some general improvements, fixes, and new content, Clock Wizard Games has included a treat for all you tricksters.

The major feature of the game's mini-Halloween event is a unique Halloween-themed costume set. It will only be available for as long as this patch, so don't miss it! If that wasn't enough, new mask customization options have been added so you can look your best while hunting horrors. Finally, the more mundane updates feature a new map, the Farm House, in addition to data on three ghosts: the Yokai, Wraith, and Naamah, respectfully. So get that spirit box ready and head in for an unforgettable Halloween!

The event will be available until the end of the month, so you still have a while before the goodies go away!

GameGrin are proud to have all their articles researched, written, and edited by real people that care about gaming.
